AutoZYC v2.0 Installation
==========================
1. Drag AutoZYC-v2.0.0.au2pkg.zip onto the Aviutl2 window
   OR
2. Extract manually to Aviutl2 installation directory:
   Script/AutoZYC/@AutoZYC.anm2
   Script/AutoZYC/@AutoZYC.tra2
   Plugins/AutoZYC.aux2

Requirements:
- Aviutl2 beta44+ (build 2004400+)
- For RPP files: REAPER project files
- For MIDI files: Standard MIDI Files (SMF) format 0 or 1

Architecture (v2.0):
- AutoZYC.aux2 (C++ plugin): Object generation, RPP/MIDI parsing, expression evaluation, config persistence
- @AutoZYC.anm2 (Lua): Mirror flip, alpha, pixel shaders (hue/brightness mapping)
- @AutoZYC.tra2 (Lua): Video playback, pitch-driven position, rhythm timing, easing functions
